## Problem statement

Describe the problem or limitation you are facing. Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you have considered.

## Affected package(s)

- [ ] `@consenti/ui` (frontend widget)
- [ ] `@consenti/api` (backend module)
- [ ] Both

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or references.
